# Eravacycline 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Eravacycline 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Eravacycline</strong> 目前有 <strong>23 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Eravacycline 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Xerava is indicated in adolescents from the age of 12 years weighing at least 50 kg, and in adults, for the treatment of complicated intra-abdominal infections (cIAI). Consideration should be given...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>bronchitis（96.8%）</li>
<li>laryngotracheitis（86.5%）</li>
<li>bronchial neoplasm (disease)（86.0%）</li>
<li>conjunctivitis（85.9%）</li>
<li>sclerosing cholangitis（84.4%）</li>
<li>autosomal dominant familial hematuria-retinal arteriolar tortuosity-contractures syndrome（77.5%）</li>
<li>resistance to thyroid hormone due to a mutation in thyroid hormone receptor beta（77.5%）</li>
<li>brain small vessel disease 1 with or without ocular anomalies（76.5%）</li>
<li>diabetic nephropathy（76.0%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（73.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/eravacycline/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
